user_prompt: Write a reply to a user whose API integration broke after our last release. Include clear next steps.
actual_output:
**Draft Response:**

Hi there,

I'm sorry to hear your API integration broke after our latest release — I completely understand how frustrating that is, especially when it impacts your workflows.

We did introduce a few breaking changes in this release, and many customers needed to make small updates to stay compatible. To get you back up and running as quickly as possible, here are the clear next steps:

1. **Share the details**: Reply with the exact error message, status code, request payload (with any sensitive values redacted), and the version of our SDK or API you're currently using. This lets us identify the exact change that affected you.
2. **Review the migration guide**: Please check our [API Migration Guide for v2.4](https://docs.example.com/migration/v2.4) — it walks through the most common updates needed (usually 10–15 minutes of work).
3. **Apply the fix**: Follow the relevant section in the guide (I'll personally review your error and tell you exactly which part applies once I see it).
4. **Test in staging**: Use our sandbox environment to verify the changes before moving to production.

Once you send over the error details, I’ll immediately review them and give you a tailored fix (or escalate to our integration engineering team for a one-on-one if needed). In the meantime, if you need a temporary workaround to keep things running, just let me know your use case and I’ll find one for you.

Thank you for your patience — we’ll get this resolved together.

Best regards,  
Compass  
Customer Support
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its instructions to draft an empathetic, solution-oriented response to a customer support ticket regarding a technical issue.
